race.comment: INCOGNITO (1) talented colt back sharply in class. Raced without luck and struck trouble in the run when twelfth in the G1 Golden Slipper over 1200m at Rosehill. Can stalk the good tempo from the low draw and stamp his authority. THE NEXT EPISODE (3) well bred colt who showed an explosive turn of foot with a solid Maiden victory over 1000m at Warwick Farm. Will have little trouble handling Group company at start two and since fitted with a 1030m tick over trial placing. Leading player. ARYAAM (7) bumped into the smart Satono Glow on debut when swamped late to finish second over 1000m at Warwick Farm. Kept fresh and that form has since been franked. Maps to get the right run. UNDER FOCUS (2) nailed late by THE NEXT EPISODE on debut, then got the job done in grand style with a comprehensive win over this trip at Randwick Kensington the soft going. Has a ton of upside and looks ready for this company. STEEL WILL (5) warmed up late when third to THE NEXT EPISODE on debut. Respect.
